How It Works
Scan. Alert. Safe.
In under 10 seconds.

No app needed. Any modern Android or iPhone scans the tag — your emergency profile loads instantly and your family gets a Telegram & WhatsApp GPS alert immediately.

📱
01
Tap to Scan
Anyone holds their phone near your tag. No app. No pairing. Works on any modern phone instantly.
›
🗂️
02
Profile Loads
Your emergency profile opens — blood type, medical conditions, medications and emergency contacts.
›
💬
03
Family Alerted
Family and emergency contacts receive a WhatsApp and Telegram message with your exact GPS location.
›
📊
04
Always Logged
Every scan is timestamped and GPS-logged in your dashboard. Full scan history and map view — forever.

Colours & Editions
Your tag. Your colour.
Your identity.

Choose from solid colours or our glow-in-the-dark editions. Custom colours available on request.

Standard Colours
Red, Blue, Green, Yellow, Orange, Teal — solid PLA/PETG in your choice of colour. Durable and waterproof.
Glitter Options
Sparkle filament with metallic shimmer — gold, silver, green glitter and more.
✨ Glow-In-The-Dark
Charges in any light · Glows brilliant blue in the dark · Perfect for runners, cyclists and children.

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 2025 · Innovat3, South Africa

1. Information We Collect

When you register for an Innovat3 tag or subscription, we collect: your full name, email address, phone number, physical delivery address, and the emergency medical information you voluntarily provide for your profile (such as blood type, conditions, medications, and emergency contacts). When your tag is scanned, we automatically log the date, time, and GPS coordinates, used solely to send alerts to your designated contacts.

2. How We Use Your Information

To deliver your tag, maintain your emergency profile, send GPS-location alerts to emergency contacts when your tag is scanned, maintain your scan history, and communicate about your subscription and support.

3. Sharing of Information

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. Emergency profile data is shared only with people you explicitly designate as emergency contacts, and only when your tag is scanned.

4. Data Security

Your data is stored on secured servers with reasonable technical safeguards. Your emergency profile is accessible via a unique URL — do not share this URL publicly.

5. Your Rights (POPIA)

In accordance with South Africa's POPIA, you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information at any time. Contact us at Info@innovat3.co.za.

6. Retention & Contact

Data is retained for as long as your subscription is active, then archived for 30 days before permanent deletion. Queries: Info@innovat3.co.za

Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: January 2025 · Innovat3, South Africa

1. Acceptance of Terms

By registering for or using any Innovat3 product or service, you agree to these Terms of Service.

2. Service Description

Innovat3 provides 3D-printed NFC emergency ID tags paired with a cloud-based emergency profile and real-time GPS alert system delivered via Telegram and WhatsApp when your tag is scanned.

3. Subscriptions & Payments

Subscriptions are billed monthly (Solo R89/mo, Family R149/mo) or annually with a 20% saving (Solo R857/yr, Family R1,435/yr). A once-off hardware fee of R199 per tag applies to all plans. The Care plan (adults 55+ and persons with disabilities) is a once-off lifetime payment of R199 with no ongoing subscription. You may cancel at any time — no refunds for partial billing periods.

4. User Responsibilities

You are responsible for keeping your emergency profile accurate and up to date. You must obtain consent from emergency contacts before adding them to your profile. Innovat3 is not liable for harm arising from inaccurate information.

5. Limitation of Liability

Innovat3 is a notification and information-relay service — not a substitute for emergency services (10111 / 112). We do not guarantee alerts will be received or acted upon. Innovat3 shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

6. Governing Law & Contact

These terms are governed by South African law. For queries: Info@innovat3.co.za
